_note: Real claude_cli variant. Pairs claude_cli with pipeline_model_driven.json (single `agent` node, no YAAH tools) so claude can use ITS OWN Read/Edit/Bash via --allowedTools. The harness orchestrates the pipeline + observability; claude owns the inside tool loop. To re-run, reset the fixture with `git checkout fixtures/buggy_code/`. Cost: roughly a few cents per opus run; haiku is cheaper.
